strengths: Relevant academic background in Food Science & Nutrition and Sports Science
9 years of experience as a nutritionist and health coach
UGC NET certification for lectureship demonstrates academic competency
weaknesses: No specific project or work experience descriptions with quantified outcomes
Resume lacks a clear work history section with company names, roles, and dates
Skills section is generic and not tied to specific achievements or technical competencies
Format is unstructured, with inconsistent date formats and missing section headers
Expression is vague and passive, lacking action verbs and concrete results
suggestions: Add a dedicated 'Work Experience' section listing each role with company name, job title, dates, and 3-5 bullet points per role describing responsibilities and quantified achievements (e.g., 'Designed customized diet plans for 50+ clients, resulting in 20% average improvement in health metrics')
Replace generic skill descriptions with specific technical skills relevant to health and fitness (e.g., dietary analysis software, fitness assessment tools, health coaching methodologies)
Restructure the resume with clear section headers: Professional Summary, Education, Work Experience, Certifications, Skills, and Projects
Use action verbs (e.g., 'Developed', 'Implemented', 'Coached', 'Analyzed') and quantify results wherever possible
Include any relevant certifications (e.g., Certified Nutritionist, Personal Trainer) and continuing education courses
Remove or minimize high school education details and focus on postgraduate and undergraduate degrees
Add a professional summary at the top that highlights key qualifications and career objective in a concise manner

sample_2.summary: 该简历具备健康与健身领域的基础教育背景和9年工作经验，但缺乏结构化格式、量化成果和具体项目描述，整体呈现远低于国际简历标准，需全面重构以突出专业成就和可衡量影响。

strengths: 持有营养学、食品科学和运动科学相关学位，教育背景与目标岗位高度相关
拥有9年营养师和健康教练工作经验，具备行业经验基础
通过UGC NET讲师资格认证，表明学术能力
weaknesses: 简历结构混乱，缺少标准模块（如工作经历、项目经验）
没有任何量化成果或具体项目描述，无法评估实际贡献
技能描述过于泛化（如团队合作、时间管理），缺乏与健康/健身直接相关的硬技能（如膳食计划软件、体适能评估）
格式不统一，日期格式不一致，存在乱码字符（â€¢）
内容表达以职责描述为主，缺乏行动动词和具体成就
suggestions: 重新组织简历结构：按标准顺序排列——个人简介/职业目标、教育背景、工作经历（按时间倒序）、核心技能、证书
为每段工作经历添加具体项目：例如在健康初创公司或健身俱乐部中，描述你设计的饮食计划数量、帮助客户达成的减重/健康指标（如平均减重X公斤，客户满意度Y%）
量化所有成就：将'设计定制饮食计划'改为'为50+客户设计个性化饮食计划，平均减重8公斤，客户留存率90%'
补充与健康/健身相关的硬技能：如营养分析软件（MyFitnessPal, Cronometer）、体适能评估（BMI、体脂率测量）、团体课程设计、健康讲座经验
统一格式：使用一致的日期格式（如MM/YYYY），删除乱码字符，使用标准项目符号，确保字体和间距一致
用行动动词开头每个要点：如'Developed'、'Implemented'、'Coached'、'Designed'，避免'Skills were developed'等被动表述
添加一个简短的职业总结（2-3句），突出9年经验的核心成就和职业目标

Technical Skills: Languages Python Python Framework Django, DRF Databases MySQL, Oracle, Sqlite, MongoDB Web Technologies CSS, HTML, RESTful Web Services REST Methodologies Agile, Scrum Version Control Github Project Managent Tool Jira Operating Systems Window, Unix Education Details 
 BE   Dr.BAMU,Aurangabad
Python Developer

Skill Details

company - Arsys inovics pvt ltd
description - Project - F-MAS (Frequency Monitoring and Analysis Systems - (F-MAS))

F-MAS is a project for managing network inventory, network communication, fault management & network traffic analysis. The telecommunications service providers, are used to support a range of telecommunication services. The Operations Support Systems (OSS) collectively provides support for various elements used in Public Switched Telephone Networks, for example processing an order may require information on the services the customer already has, the network they are using, and currently available resources.

Responsibilities:
• Participated in entire lifecycle of the projects including Design, Development, and Deployment, Testing and Implementation and support.
• Developed views and templates with Python and Django's view controller and templating language to created user-friendly website interface.
• Implemented navigation rules for the application and page outcomes, written controllers using annotations.
• Created this project using Django, Django REST API, MYSQL, PyMYSQL, Python, HTML5, CSS3.
• Created CRUD methods (get, post, put, delete) to make requests to the API server and tested Restful API
using Postman.
• Created Unit test cases for unit testing.
• Worked with JSON based REST Web services
• Wrote Python routines to log into the websites and fetch data for selected options.
• Used Python modules such as requests, urllib for web crawling.
• Added the navigations and paginations and filtering columns and adding and removing the desired columns for view.
• Created a Git repository and added the project to GitHub.
• Utilized Agile process and JIRA issue management to track sprint cycles.
• Worked in an agile development environment.

Environment: Python, Django, MySQL, HTML, CSS, SQLAlchemy, JSON, agile, Web Services (REST), Urllib.
company - Arsys
description - 1. Working as back end as well as front end developer
2. working on rest and restfull api's.
3. Design and develop a project in Agile scrum.
4. Git hub for code deployment
5. Working on MVT .

suggestions: 重构简历结构：采用标准国际简历格式，按'Summary/Professional Profile'、'Skills'、'Experience'、'Education'、'Projects'顺序组织，确保ATS友好
为每个项目添加量化成果：例如'使用TF-IDF和LSA进行文本分类，准确率达到XX%'或'通过RNN模型将情感分析F1分数提升至XX'
删除或精简无关经历（如保险销售），集中展示数据科学相关项目；如果必须保留，需说明转移技能（如客户数据分析）
修正所有拼写和语法错误：'Deep Leaning'→'Deep Learning'，'Matplotliv'→'Matplotlib'，'Exprience'→'Experience'
使用行动动词（如'Developed'、'Implemented'、'Optimized'）开头每个项目点，并统一时态（过去式）
教育部分只保留最高学历（M.E.）和本科学位，删除重复和无关条目（如Polytechnic和M.Tech Thesis Detail），并注明毕业年份和GPA（如有）
增加一个'Projects'或'Portfolio'部分，列出1-2个独立数据科学项目（如Kaggle竞赛或GitHub项目），以弥补经验不足

resume_text:
Skills * Programming Languages: Python (pandas, numpy, scipy, scikit-learn, matplotlib), Sql, Java, JavaScript/JQuery. * Machine learning: Regression, SVM, Naïve Bayes, KNN, Random Forest, Decision Trees, Boosting techniques, Cluster Analysis, Word Embedding, Sentiment Analysis, Natural Language processing, Dimensionality reduction, Topic Modelling (LDA, NMF), PCA & Neural Nets. * Database Visualizations: Mysql, SqlServer, Cassandra, Hbase, ElasticSearch D3.js, DC.js, Plotly, kibana, matplotlib, ggplot, Tableau. * Others: Regular Expression, HTML, CSS, Angular 6, Logstash, Kafka, Python Flask, Git, Docker, computer vision - Open CV and understanding of Deep learning.Education Details 

Data Science Assurance Associate 

Data Science Assurance Associate - Ernst & Young LLP
Skill Details 
JAVASCRIPT- Exprience - 24 months
jQuery- Exprience - 24 months
Python- Exprience - 24 monthsCompany Details 
company - Ernst & Young LLP
description - Fraud Investigations and Dispute Services   Assurance
TECHNOLOGY ASSISTED REVIEW
TAR (Technology Assisted Review) assists in accelerating the review process and run analytics and generate reports.
* Core member of a team helped in developing automated review platform tool from scratch for assisting E discovery domain, this tool implements predictive coding and topic modelling by automating reviews, resulting in reduced labor costs and time spent during the lawyers review.
* Understand the end to end flow of the solution, doing research and development for classification models, predictive analysis and mining of the information present in text data. Worked on analyzing the outputs and precision monitoring for the entire tool.
* TAR assists in predictive coding, topic modelling from the evidence by following EY standards. Developed the classifier models in order to identify "red flags" and fraud-related issues.

Tools & Technologies: Python, scikit-learn, tfidf, word2vec, doc2vec, cosine similarity, Naïve Bayes, LDA, NMF for topic modelling, Vader and text blob for sentiment analysis. Matplot lib, Tableau dashboard for reporting.

MULTIPLE DATA SCIENCE AND ANALYTIC PROJECTS (USA CLIENTS)
TEXT ANALYTICS - MOTOR VEHICLE CUSTOMER REVIEW DATA * Received customer feedback survey data for past one year. Performed sentiment (Positive, Negative & Neutral) and time series analysis on customer comments across all 4 categories.
* Created heat map of terms by survey category based on frequency of words * Extracted Positive and Negative words across all the Survey categories and plotted Word cloud.
* Created customized tableau dashboards for effective reporting and visualizations.
CHATBOT * Developed a user friendly chatbot for one of our Products which handle simple questions about hours of operation, reservation options and so on.
* This chat bot serves entire product related questions. Giving overview of tool via QA platform and also give recommendation responses so that user question to build chain of relevant answer.
* This too has intelligence to build the pipeline of questions as per user requirement and asks the relevant /recommended questions.

Tools & Technologies: Python, Natural language processing, NLTK, spacy, topic modelling, Sentiment analysis, Word Embedding, scikit-learn, JavaScript/JQuery, SqlServer

INFORMATION GOVERNANCE
Organizations to make informed decisions about all of the information they store. The integrated Information Governance portfolio synthesizes intelligence across unstructured data sources and facilitates action to ensure organizations are best positioned to counter information risk.
* Scan data from multiple sources of formats and parse different file formats, extract Meta data information, push results for indexing elastic search and created customized, interactive dashboards using kibana.
* Preforming ROT Analysis on the data which give information of data which helps identify content that is either Redundant, Outdated, or Trivial.
* Preforming full-text search analysis on elastic search with predefined methods which can tag as (PII) personally identifiable information (social security numbers, addresses, names, etc.) which frequently targeted during cyber-attacks.
Tools & Technologies: Python, Flask, Elastic Search, Kibana

FRAUD ANALYTIC PLATFORM
Fraud Analytics and investigative platform to review all red flag cases.
• FAP is a Fraud Analytics and investigative platform with inbuilt case manager and suite of Analytics for various ERP systems.
* It can be used by clients to interrogate their Accounting systems for identifying the anomalies which can be indicators of fraud by running advanced analytics
Tools & Technologies: HTML, JavaScript, SqlServer, JQuery, CSS, Bootstrap, Node.js, D3.js, DC.js

Technical Skills: Languages Python Python Framework Django, DRF Databases MySQL, Oracle, Sqlite, MongoDB Web Technologies CSS, HTML, RESTful Web Services REST Methodologies Agile, Scrum Version Control Github Project Managent Tool Jira Operating Systems Window, Unix Education Details

company - Arsys inovics pvt ltd
description - Project - F-MAS (Frequency Monitoring and Analysis Systems - (F-MAS))

F-MAS is a project for managing network inventory, network communication, fault management & network traffic analysis. The telecommunications service providers, are used to support a range of telecommunication services. The Operations Support Systems (OSS) collectively provides support for various elements used in Public Switched Telephone Networks, for example processing an order may require information on the services the customer already has, the network they are using, and currently available resources.

Responsibilities:
• Participated in entire lifecycle of the projects including Design, Development, and Deployment, Testing and Implementation and support.
• Developed views and templates with Python and Django's view controller and templating language to created user-friendly website interface.
• Implemented navigation rules for the application and page outcomes, written controllers using annotations.
• Created this project using Django, Django REST API, MYSQL, PyMYSQL, Python, HTML5, CSS3.
• Created CRUD methods (get, post, put, delete) to make requests to the API server and tested Restful API
using Postman.
• Created Unit test cases for unit testing.
• Worked with JSON based REST Web services
• Wrote Python routines to log into the websites and fetch data for selected options.
• Used Python modules such as requests, urllib for web crawling.
• Added the navigations and paginations and filtering columns and adding and removing the desired columns for view.
• Created a Git repository and added the project to GitHub.
• Utilized Agile process and JIRA issue management to track sprint cycles.
• Worked in an agile development environment.

Environment: Python, Django, MySQL, HTML, CSS, SQLAlchemy, JSON, agile, Web Services (REST), Urllib.
company - Arsys
description - 1. Working as back end as well as front end developer
2. working on rest and restfull api's.
3. Design and develop a project in Agile scrum.
4. Git hub for code deployment
5. Working on MVT .

sample_0.summary: 该简历展示了候选人在Python/Django开发方面的基础技能和约2.5年的项目经验，但格式混乱、缺乏量化成果、教育信息不完整，整体距离国际标准简历差距较大，需大幅优化结构和内容表达。

strengths: 核心技能（Python、Django、MySQL、REST API）与目标岗位匹配
有完整的项目生命周期参与经验，包括设计、开发、测试和部署
熟悉敏捷开发流程和JIRA项目管理工具
weaknesses: 简历格式混乱，缺乏清晰的结构和层次，ATS兼容性差
项目经验缺乏量化成果（如性能提升、用户数、响应时间等）
教育背景信息不完整，缺少GPA、荣誉或相关课程
内容表达存在拼写错误（如'Exprience'应为'Experience'）和语法问题
技能列表重复且格式不一致，部分技能经验时间标注为'Less than 1 year'但未具体说明
suggestions: 重新组织简历结构：使用标准章节标题（Summary、Skills、Experience、Education），并采用一致的日期格式和项目符号
为每个项目添加量化成果：例如'通过优化Django查询将API响应时间减少30%'或'处理了1000+条网络设备数据'
补充教育背景细节：包括毕业年份、GPA（如>3.0）、相关课程（如数据结构、算法）或任何学术荣誉
修正拼写错误：将'Exprience'改为'Experience'，'Sqlit3'改为'SQLite'，'Window'改为'Windows'
使用更强的行动动词：将'Participated in'改为'Led'或'Delivered'，将'Created'改为'Architected'或'Developed'
技能部分应精简并分组：将Python、Django、DRF等核心技能放在前面，次要技能（如CSS、HTML）放在后面
添加个人简介（Professional Summary）：用2-3句话概括核心能力和成就，例如'拥有2.5年经验的Python开发者，擅长Django REST API开发和数据库优化'
sample_1.summary: 该候选人具备Python Developer岗位所需的核心技术栈（Python、Django、MySQL、REST API），但简历格式混乱、缺乏量化成果和表达不够专业，整体质量处于中等偏下水平，需大幅优化结构和内容以符合国际简历标准。

掌握版本控制：使用 Git/GitHub 进行代码管理
weaknesses: 格式混乱：技能列表以纯文本形式列出，缺乏结构化排版，可读性差

suggestions: 重新排版：使用标准简历模板，将技能按类别分组（如 Languages、Frameworks、Databases、Tools），使用项目符号而非纯文本
量化项目成果：为 F-MAS 项目添加具体指标，例如“优化数据库查询使响应时间降低 30%”、“处理日均 10 万+ API 请求”
完善教育背景：补充毕业年份、GPA（如 3.5+/4.0）、相关课程或荣誉，若成绩优秀可突出

增加职业总结：在简历顶部添加 2-3 句个人简介，突出 Python 开发经验和核心优势
统一日期格式：所有经历需标注起止月份/年份（如 2021.06 - 2024.01），增强时间线清晰度
补充开源或个人项目：若有可能，添加 GitHub 链接或独立项目，展示技术深度和主动性

company - Arsys inovics pvt ltd
description - Project - F-MAS (Frequency Monitoring and Analysis Systems - (F-MAS))

F-MAS is a project for managing network inventory, network communication, fault management & network traffic analysis. The telecommunications service providers, are used to support a range of telecommunication services. The Operations Support Systems (OSS) collectively provides support for various elements used in Public Switched Telephone Networks, for example processing an order may require information on the services the customer already has, the network they are using, and currently available resources.

Responsibilities:
• Participated in entire lifecycle of the projects including Design, Development, and Deployment, Testing and Implementation and support.
• Developed views and templates with Python and Django's view controller and templating language to created user-friendly website interface.
• Implemented navigation rules for the application and page outcomes, written controllers using annotations.
• Created this project using Django, Django REST API, MYSQL, PyMYSQL, Python, HTML5, CSS3.
• Created CRUD methods (get, post, put, delete) to make requests to the API server and tested Restful API
using Postman.
• Created Unit test cases for unit testing.
• Worked with JSON based REST Web services
• Wrote Python routines to log into the websites and fetch data for selected options.
• Used Python modules such as requests, urllib for web crawling.
• Added the navigations and paginations and filtering columns and adding and removing the desired columns for view.
• Created a Git repository and added the project to GitHub.
• Utilized Agile process and JIRA issue management to track sprint cycles.
• Worked in an agile development environment.

Environment: Python, Django, MySQL, HTML, CSS, SQLAlchemy, JSON, agile, Web Services (REST), Urllib.
company - Arsys
description - 1. Working as back end as well as front end developer
2. working on rest and restfull api's.
3. Design and develop a project in Agile scrum.
4. Git hub for code deployment
5. Working on MVT .

company - Arsys inovics pvt ltd
description - Project - F-MAS (Frequency Monitoring and Analysis Systems - (F-MAS))

F-MAS is a project for managing network inventory, network communication, fault management & network traffic analysis. The telecommunications service providers, are used to support a range of telecommunication services. The Operations Support Systems (OSS) collectively provides support for various elements used in Public Switched Telephone Networks, for example processing an order may require information on the services the customer already has, the network they are using, and currently available resources.

Responsibilities:
• Participated in entire lifecycle of the projects including Design, Development, and Deployment, Testing and Implementation and support.
• Developed views and templates with Python and Django's view controller and templating language to created user-friendly website interface.
• Implemented navigation rules for the application and page outcomes, written controllers using annotations.
• Created this project using Django, Django REST API, MYSQL, PyMYSQL, Python, HTML5, CSS3.
• Created CRUD methods (get, post, put, delete) to make requests to the API server and tested Restful API
using Postman.
• Created Unit test cases for unit testing.
• Worked with JSON based REST Web services
• Wrote Python routines to log into the websites and fetch data for selected options.
• Used Python modules such as requests, urllib for web crawling.
• Added the navigations and paginations and filtering columns and adding and removing the desired columns for view.
• Created a Git repository and added the project to GitHub.
• Utilized Agile process and JIRA issue management to track sprint cycles.
• Worked in an agile development environment.

Environment: Python, Django, MySQL, HTML, CSS, SQLAlchemy, JSON, agile, Web Services (REST), Urllib.
company - Arsys
description - 1. Working as back end as well as front end developer
2. working on rest and restfull api's.
3. Design and develop a project in Agile scrum.
4. Git hub for code deployment
5. Working on MVT .

Technical Skills / Responsibilities: • Hands on Experience with Production and Maintenance of Projects. • Experience in handling projects in agile methodology. • Experience in handling projects in SDLC, Involved in each stage of Software Development Life Cycle. • Responsible to gather requirement (Customer Interaction) and providing Estimate & solution document then as per process FS, TS, Coding, UTP, UTR, PTF, SOW submission to customer. • Having strong knowledge of Debugging and Testing based on Python and AS/400. • Worked as Change Controller - Responsible for promoting changes in Development to UAT and LIVE environment through Pivotal Cloud Foundry. • Have good communication skills, Inter personal skills, hardworking and result oriented as an Individual and in team. suggestions: 重构简历结构：按Summary、Technical Skills、Professional Experience、Education、Certifications顺序组织，确保ATS友好
在Python项目经验中补充量化成果，例如：'Developed RESTful APIs using Flask, reducing response time by 30%' 或 'Automated data scraping pipeline, processing 10K+ records daily'

统一日期格式（如MM/YYYY），并确保所有技能都标注熟练程度和实际应用场景
使用更强的行动动词：如'Architected', 'Optimized', 'Implemented', 'Automated' 替代 'Experience in'
将内部培训列表整合到技能部分，避免单独罗列，节省空间并提升专业度

sample_0.summary: 该候选人简历在技能匹配、项目质量和表达方面存在明显不足，主要问题为Python经验不足1年且缺乏量化项目成果，格式混乱，需大幅重构以符合国际Python Developer岗位标准。

strengths: Has foundational Python skills and completed multiple internal Python-related trainings (web crawling, scraping, data science, Django, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL)
Long tenure at one company (KPIT Technologies since 2011) showing stability and domain experience in ERP/AS400
Holds a Master's degree in Computer Science from a recognized university
weaknesses: Python experience is very limited (less than 1 year) and lacks depth for a Python Developer role; primary expertise is in legacy AS/400 and ERP systems
No quantified project achievements or measurable impact; descriptions are generic responsibilities rather than accomplishments
Resume is poorly structured, with redundant sections, inconsistent formatting, and no clear separation of experience vs. skills vs. training
Expression is weak: uses passive voice, vague phrases ('hands on experience', 'good communication skills'), and contains spelling/grammar errors ('Exprience', 'till date')
suggestions: Restructure the resume into clear sections: Professional Summary, Technical Skills, Work Experience (with bullet points per role), Education, Certifications. Remove redundant training lists.
For each project/role, use STAR format and add quantified results (e.g., 'Reduced API response time by 30%', 'Automated X process saving Y hours/week').
Focus the skills section on Python-relevant technologies (Flask, Django, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, REST APIs) and de-emphasize AS/400 unless targeting a hybrid role.
Improve language: replace vague phrases with action verbs (developed, implemented, optimized, delivered) and concrete outcomes. Fix spelling errors.
Add a professional summary at the top that clearly states your target role (Python Developer) and highlights transferable skills from your ERP background.

resume_text:
Training attended: 1. Successfully completed ESD program conducted by Zensar Technologies, Pune in 2017. 2. Successfully completed Employability training conducted by Barclays, Global Talent Track, and NASSCOM foundation in 2015. Achievements: 1. Treasurer in IEEE student branch at JSCOE, Pune for 2017-18. 2. Worked as team leader in college’s various technical and cultural events from 2016 - 2017. 3. Project idea got selected for final prototyping round in KPIT-Sparkle 2018, Pune. 4. Participated in Avishkar 2017 conducted by Savitribai Phule Pune University. 5. Project idea submitted in Accenture Innovation 2018, Pune. 6. Brought sponsorship of Rs. 15,000 from Platinum Auto (formerly Royal Enfield) in 2017, Pune. 7. Secured 1 st Rank for college level competition of Poster presentation on Smart ambulance in 2017, Pune. 8. Organized IEEE workshop on ‘Excellence in English and Public Speaking’ in 2017, Pune Workshops attended: 1. Successfully completed 4 days’ workshop on ‘Medical IOT’ conducted by IEEE standard’s association at VIP in 2017, Pune. 2. Successfully completed 2 days’ workshop on ‘Introduction to Arduino’ at SCOE in 2016, Pune. 3. Successfully completed 3 days’ workshop on ‘Robotics for Juniors’ conducted by Computer Society of India at SKNCOE in 2016, Pune. 4. Participated in various inter-college technical competitions at SCOE, PICT, and AISSMS, Pune. Education Details 
June 2018 Bachelor of Engineering Computer Pune, Maharashtra Savitribai Phule Pune University
June 2014 HSC   Maharashtra State Board
June 2012 SSC   Maharashtra State Board
Python Developer 

Python Developer - Atos Syntel
Skill Details 
PYTHON- Exprience - 15 months
DATABASE- Exprience - 7 months
MYSQL- Exprience - 7 months
DJANGO- Exprience - 6 months
HTML5- Exprience - 6 months
REST API- Exprience - 6 monthsCompany Details 
company - Atos Syntel
description - Working as a developer in the field of computer vision for a US based client in banking domain.
1. Design and development of computer vision based algorithms for image preprocessing using OpenCV, PIL, and Numpy.
2. Unit testing and debugging the code and maintaining the versions using Git.

resume_text:
Skills * Programming Languages: Python (pandas, numpy, scipy, scikit-learn, matplotlib), Sql, Java, JavaScript/JQuery. * Machine learning: Regression, SVM, Naïve Bayes, KNN, Random Forest, Decision Trees, Boosting techniques, Cluster Analysis, Word Embedding, Sentiment Analysis, Natural Language processing, Dimensionality reduction, Topic Modelling (LDA, NMF), PCA & Neural Nets. * Database Visualizations: Mysql, SqlServer, Cassandra, Hbase, ElasticSearch D3.js, DC.js, Plotly, kibana, matplotlib, ggplot, Tableau. * Others: Regular Expression, HTML, CSS, Angular 6, Logstash, Kafka, Python Flask, Git, Docker, computer vision - Open CV and understanding of Deep learning.Education Details 

Data Science Assurance Associate 

Data Science Assurance Associate - Ernst & Young LLP
Skill Details 
JAVASCRIPT- Exprience - 24 months
jQuery- Exprience - 24 months
Python- Exprience - 24 monthsCompany Details 
company - Ernst & Young LLP
description - Fraud Investigations and Dispute Services   Assurance
TECHNOLOGY ASSISTED REVIEW
TAR (Technology Assisted Review) assists in accelerating the review process and run analytics and generate reports.
* Core member of a team helped in developing automated review platform tool from scratch for assisting E discovery domain, this tool implements predictive coding and topic modelling by automating reviews, resulting in reduced labor costs and time spent during the lawyers review.
* Understand the end to end flow of the solution, doing research and development for classification models, predictive analysis and mining of the information present in text data. Worked on analyzing the outputs and precision monitoring for the entire tool.
* TAR assists in predictive coding, topic modelling from the evidence by following EY standards. Developed the classifier models in order to identify "red flags" and fraud-related issues.

Tools & Technologies: Python, scikit-learn, tfidf, word2vec, doc2vec, cosine similarity, Naïve Bayes, LDA, NMF for topic modelling, Vader and text blob for sentiment analysis. Matplot lib, Tableau dashboard for reporting.

MULTIPLE DATA SCIENCE AND ANALYTIC PROJECTS (USA CLIENTS)
TEXT ANALYTICS - MOTOR VEHICLE CUSTOMER REVIEW DATA * Received customer feedback survey data for past one year. Performed sentiment (Positive, Negative & Neutral) and time series analysis on customer comments across all 4 categories.
* Created heat map of terms by survey category based on frequency of words * Extracted Positive and Negative words across all the Survey categories and plotted Word cloud.
* Created customized tableau dashboards for effective reporting and visualizations.
CHATBOT * Developed a user friendly chatbot for one of our Products which handle simple questions about hours of operation, reservation options and so on.
* This chat bot serves entire product related questions. Giving overview of tool via QA platform and also give recommendation responses so that user question to build chain of relevant answer.
* This too has intelligence to build the pipeline of questions as per user requirement and asks the relevant /recommended questions.

Tools & Technologies: Python, Natural language processing, NLTK, spacy, topic modelling, Sentiment analysis, Word Embedding, scikit-learn, JavaScript/JQuery, SqlServer

INFORMATION GOVERNANCE
Organizations to make informed decisions about all of the information they store. The integrated Information Governance portfolio synthesizes intelligence across unstructured data sources and facilitates action to ensure organizations are best positioned to counter information risk.
* Scan data from multiple sources of formats and parse different file formats, extract Meta data information, push results for indexing elastic search and created customized, interactive dashboards using kibana.
* Preforming ROT Analysis on the data which give information of data which helps identify content that is either Redundant, Outdated, or Trivial.
* Preforming full-text search analysis on elastic search with predefined methods which can tag as (PII) personally identifiable information (social security numbers, addresses, names, etc.) which frequently targeted during cyber-attacks.
Tools & Technologies: Python, Flask, Elastic Search, Kibana

FRAUD ANALYTIC PLATFORM
Fraud Analytics and investigative platform to review all red flag cases.
• FAP is a Fraud Analytics and investigative platform with inbuilt case manager and suite of Analytics for various ERP systems.
* It can be used by clients to interrogate their Accounting systems for identifying the anomalies which can be indicators of fraud by running advanced analytics
Tools & Technologies: HTML, JavaScript, SqlServer, JQuery, CSS, Bootstrap, Node.js, D3.js, DC.js

company - Deloitte USI
description - The project involved analysing historic deals and coming with insights to optimize future deals.
Role: Was given raw data, carried out end to end analysis and presented insights to client.
Key Responsibilities:
• Extract data from client systems across geographies.
• Understand and build reports in tableau. Infer meaningful insights to optimize prices and find out process blockades.
Technical Environment: R, Tableau.

Industry: Cross Industry
Service Area: Cross Industry - Products
Project Name: Handwriting recognition
Consultant: 3 months.
The project involved taking handwritten images and converting them to digital text images by object detection and sentence creation.
Role: I was developing sentence correction functionality.
Key Responsibilities:
• Gather data large enough to capture all English words
• Train LSTM models on words.
Technical Environment: Python.

Industry: Finance
Service Area: Financial Services - BI development Project Name: SWIFT
Consultant: 8 months.
The project was to develop an analytics infrastructure on top of SAP S/4, it would user to view
financial reports to respective departments. Reporting also included forecasting expenses.
Role: I was leading the offshore team.
Key Responsibilities:
• Design & Develop data models for reporting.
• Develop ETL for data flow
• Validate various reports.
Technical Environment: SAP HANA, Tableau, SAP AO.

Industry: Healthcare Analytics
Service Area: Life Sciences - Product development Project Name: Clinical Healthcare System
Consultant: 2 months.
The project was to develop an analytics infrastructure on top of Argus, it would allow users to query faster and provide advance analytics capabilities.
Role: I was involved from design to deploy phase, performed a lot of data restructuring and built
models for insights.
Key Responsibilities:
• Design & Develop data models for reporting.
• Develop and deploy analytical models.
• Validate various reports.
Technical Environment: Data Modelling, SAP HANA, Tableau, NLP.

Industry: FMCG
Service Area: Trade & Promotion
Project Name: Consumption Based Planning for Flowers Foods Consultant; 8 months.
The project involved setting up of CRM and CBP modules.
Role: I was involved in key data decomposition activities and setting up the base for future year
forecast. Over the course of the project I developed various models and carried out key
performance improvements.
Key Responsibilities:
• Design & Develop HANA models for decomposition.
• Develop data flow for forecast.
• Developed various views for reporting of Customer/Sales/Funds.
• Validate various reports in BOBJ.
Technical Environment: Data Modelling, SAP HANA, BOBJ, Time Series Forecasting.

Internal Initiative Industry: FMCG
Customer Segmentation and RFM analysis Consultant; 3 months.
The initiative involved setting up of HANA-Python interface and advance analytics on Python. Over the course I had successfully segmented data into five core segments using K-means and carried out RFM analysis in Python. Also developed algorithm to categorize any new customer under the defined buckets.
Technical Environment: Anaconda3, Python3.6, HANA SPS12

Industry: Telecom Invoice state detection Consultant; 1 months.
The initiative was to reduce the manual effort in verifying closed and open invoices manually, it
involved development to a decision tree to classify open/closed invoices. This enabled effort
reduction by 60%.
Technical Environment: R, SAP PAL, SAP HANA SPS12

Accenture Experience
Industry: Analytics - Cross Industry
In Process Analytics for SAP Senior Developer; 19 months.
Accenture Solutions Pvt. Ltd., India
The project involved development of SAP analytics tool - In Process Analytics (IPA) . My role was to develop database objects and data models to provide operational insights to clients.
Role: I have developed various Finance related KPIs and spearheaded various deployments.
Introduced SAP Predictive analytics to reduce development time and reuse functionalities for KPIs and prepared production planning reports.
Key Responsibilities:
• Involved in information gather phase.
• Designed and implemented SAP HANA data modelling using Attribute View, Analytic View, and
Calculation View.
• Developed various KPI's individually using complex SQL scripts in Calculation views.
• Created procedures in HANA Database.
• Took ownership and developed Dashboard functionality.
• Involved in building data processing algorithms to be executed in R server for cluster analysis.
Technical Environment: R, SAP HANA, T-SQL.
Industry: Cross Industry
Accenture Testing Accelerator for SAP Database Developer; 21 months.
Accenture Solutions Pvt. Ltd., India
Role: I have taken care of all development activities for the ATAS tool and have also completed
various deployments of the product.
Apart from these activities I was also actively involved in maintenance of the database servers
(Production & Quality)
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyzing business requirements, understanding the scope, getting requirements clarified
interacting with business and further transform all requirements to generate attribute
mapping documents and reviewing mapping specification documentation
• Create / Update database objects like tables, views, stored procedures, function, and packages
• Monitored SQL Server Error Logs and Application Logs through SQL Server Agent
• Prepared Data Flow Diagrams, Entity Relationship Diagrams using UML
• Responsible for Designing, developing and Normalization of database tables
• Experience in performance tuning using SQL profiler.
• Involved in QA, UAT, knowledge transfer and support activities
Technical Environment: SQL Server 2008/2014, Visual Studio 2010, Windows Server, Performance
Monitor, SQL Server Profiler, C#, PL-SQL, T-SQL.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design & Develop data models for reporting.
• Develop ETL for data flow
• Validate various reports.

Industry: Healthcare Analytics
Service Area: Life Sciences - Product development Project Name: Clinical Healthcare System
Consultant: 2 months.
The project was to develop an analytics infrastructure on top of Argus, it would allow users to query faster and provide advance analytics capabilities.

models for insights.

Internal Initiative Industry: FMCG
Customer Segmentation and RFM analysis Consultant; 3 months.
The initiative involved setting up of HANA-Python interface and advance analytics on Python. Over the course I had successfully segmented data into five core segments using K-means and carried out RFM analysis in Python. Also developed algorithm to categorize any new customer under the defined buckets.
Technical Environment: Anaconda3, Python3.6, HANA SPS12

Industry: Telecom Invoice state detection Consultant; 1 months.
The initiative was to reduce the manual effort in verifying closed and open invoices manually, it
involved development to a decision tree to classify open/closed invoices. This enabled effort

Technical Environment: R, SAP PAL, SAP HANA SPS12

Accenture Experience

In Process Analytics for SAP Senior Developer; 19 months.
Accenture Solutions Pvt. Ltd., India
The project involved development of SAP analytics tool - In Process Analytics (IPA) . My role was to develop database objects and data models to provide operational insights to clients.
Role: I have developed various Finance related KPIs and spearheaded various deployments.
Introduced SAP Predictive analytics to reduce development time and reuse functionalities for KPIs and prepared production planning reports.
Key Responsibilities:

Calculation View.

• Created procedures in HANA Database.

• Involved in building data processing algorithms to be executed in R server for cluster analysis.
Technical Environment: R, SAP HANA, T-SQL.
Industry: Cross Industry
Accenture Testing Accelerator for SAP Database Developer; 21 months.
Accenture Solutions Pvt. Ltd., India

Apart from these activities I was also actively involved in maintenance of the database servers
(Production & Quality)
Key Responsibilities:

interacting with business and further transform all requirements to generate attribute
mapping documents and reviewing mapping specification documentation

• Monitored SQL Server Error Logs and Application Logs through SQL Server Agent
• Prepared Data Flow Diagrams, Entity Relationship Diagrams using UML
• Responsible for Designing, developing and Normalization of database tables
• Experience in performance tuning using SQL profiler.
• Involved in QA, UAT, knowledge transfer and support activities
Technical Environment: SQL Server 2008/2014, Visual Studio 2010, Windows Server, Performance
Monitor, SQL Server Profiler, C#, PL-SQL, T-SQL.

strengths: Relevant educational background with a PGDM in Business Analytics from a recognized institution (Great Lakes & Illinois Tech)
Broad exposure to multiple industries (FMCG, Finance, Healthcare, Telecom) demonstrating adaptability
Hands-on experience with key data science tools: Python, R, Tableau, SAP HANA, SQL, NLP, and Time Series Forecasting
Some projects show end-to-end involvement from data extraction to insight presentation
One project includes a quantified result (60% effort reduction in invoice classification)
weaknesses: Resume structure is chaotic: skills, education, and experience sections are interleaved without clear separation
Project descriptions are mostly responsibility-based (e.g., 'Extract data', 'Build reports') with very few quantified achievements
Skill experience durations are inconsistently reported and often vague ('Less than 1 year months')
Formatting issues: inconsistent date formats, missing section headers, and a large block of unstructured text at the end
Language is generic and passive; lacks strong action verbs and specific impact metrics
suggestions: Restructure the resume into clear, standard sections: Professional Summary, Skills, Work Experience, Education, Projects. Use consistent headers and bullet points.

For each project, rewrite descriptions using the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result) and include at least one quantified outcome (e.g., 'Reduced processing time by 30%', 'Improved forecast accuracy by 15%').
Standardize skill experience durations: remove vague phrases like 'Less than 1 year months' and replace with precise months or years (e.g., 'Python: 2 years').
Add a 2-3 line professional summary at the top highlighting your core expertise (e.g., data science consultant with experience in predictive modeling, NLP, and analytics infrastructure).
Fix all formatting inconsistencies: align dates (use MM/YYYY consistently), ensure bullet points are uniform, and remove redundant sections like 'Skill Details' that repeat the skills list.

Strengthen language by using strong action verbs: 'Designed', 'Developed', 'Optimized', 'Led', 'Implemented', 'Reduced'. Replace passive phrases like 'Was given raw data' with 'Analyzed raw data to generate actionable insights'.
Consider adding a link to your GitHub or portfolio if available, to showcase code samples or project outcomes.

sample_0.summary: 该简历展示了候选人在数据科学咨询领域的广泛行业经验，但格式混乱、缺乏量化成果和被动语言严重影响了竞争力，需按国际标准（如STAR法则和ATS友好格式）进行大幅重构。

strengths: Relevant educational background with a PGDM in Business Analytics from a recognized program (Great Lakes & Illinois Tech)
Diverse industry experience (Cross-Industry, Finance, Healthcare, FMCG, Telecom) showing adaptability
Hands-on experience with a broad set of tools (R, Python, Tableau, SAP HANA, SQL, NLP)
Demonstrated ability to lead offshore teams and deliver end-to-end analytics solutions
weaknesses: Project descriptions are heavily responsibility-focused (what was done) rather than achievement-focused (what was achieved), lacking quantified impact
Formatting is inconsistent and cluttered; sections like 'Skill Details' and 'Company Details' are poorly structured, making it hard to scan
Expression is generic and passive (e.g., 'Was given raw data', 'I was developing'), with few action verbs or concrete results
Skills section lists many tools but experience durations are very short (<1 year for core DS skills like Python, ML, DL), raising concerns about depth
Resume is overly long and repetitive; key information is buried in verbose paragraphs
suggestions: Restructure the resume with clear, ATS-friendly section headers: Professional Summary, Skills, Experience, Education. Use a consistent date format (e.g., MM/YYYY).
Rewrite project bullets using the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result) and include quantified outcomes (e.g., 'Reduced manual effort by 60%' is good; add more such metrics).
Consolidate the 'Skill Details' section into a concise skills matrix or list; remove redundant entries (e.g., 'RETAIL' and 'RETAIL MARKETING' can be merged).
Use strong action verbs (e.g., 'Architected', 'Optimized', 'Led', 'Developed') to start each bullet point, and avoid passive constructions like 'Was given' or 'I was involved'.
Shorten the resume to 1-2 pages by removing low-value details (e.g., 'Industry: Cross Industry' repeated multiple times) and focusing on the most impactful projects.
Add a Professional Summary at the top that highlights your core Data Science expertise, key achievements, and career objective.
sample_1.summary: 该简历展示了候选人在数据科学领域的广泛技能和跨行业项目经验，但格式混乱、内容表达缺乏量化成果，整体质量中等，需按国际简历标准进行大幅优化。

strengths: 拥有丰富的SAP HANA生态技术栈（HANA SQL、PAL、Lumira、BOBJ）
具备跨行业（金融、医疗、FMCG、电信）的数据科学咨询经验
有实际项目落地成果，如电信发票分类减少60%人工工作量
教育背景包含PGDM商业分析，与目标岗位直接相关
weaknesses: 简历格式混乱，大量未结构化文本，ATS解析困难
项目描述多为职责罗列，缺乏量化成果（除一个项目外）
技能列表与项目经验脱节，Python/深度学习声称经验不足1年
语言表达存在拼写错误（Exprience→Experience）和语法问题
缺少简历摘要/职业目标，无法快速定位候选人定位
suggestions: 彻底重构简历结构：按「专业摘要→核心技能→工作经历→教育背景」标准顺序排列
每个项目使用STAR法则重写，突出量化成果（如：'通过K-means聚类将客户分群准确率提升XX%'）
统一日期格式为MM/YYYY，并补充每个项目的起止月份
删除冗余的'Skill Details'重复区块，将技能整合到技能栏或项目描述中
修正所有拼写错误（Exprience→Experience，Advance→Advanced）
为每个项目补充具体的技术细节（如LSTM层数、K-means的K值选择依据）
添加2-3行职业摘要，突出数据科学核心能力（如：'5年数据科学咨询经验，专精于SAP生态下的预测建模与NLP应用'）
sample_2.summary: 该候选人具备扎实的SAP生态数据科学技能和跨行业咨询经验，但简历格式混乱、缺乏量化成果和语言表达问题严重影响了竞争力，需按国际标准全面重构以匹配Data Science岗位要求。

strengths: 拥有数据科学相关的核心技能组合（Python、R、SQL、Tableau、NLP、机器学习）
具备多个行业的实际项目经验（金融、医疗、FMCG、电信）
教育背景与目标岗位高度相关（PGDM商业分析）
有领导团队和端到端分析的经验
weaknesses: 项目描述缺乏量化成果（如提升百分比、节省成本等）
格式混乱，信息重复，缺乏清晰的结构和层次
技能部分与项目经验脱节，深度和年限不匹配
语言表达多为职责描述而非成就，缺乏行动动词和具体影响
suggestions: 重新组织简历结构：使用标准分区（Summary / Skills / Experience / Education），确保每个项目有明确的标题、公司、时间、角色和量化成果
为每个项目添加量化指标：例如“通过决策树分类减少60%人工核对工作量”应突出，其他项目也需补充类似数据
技能列表应精简并分组（如编程语言、数据库、可视化、机器学习），删除重复项，并注明熟练程度（如“Python: 2年”）
项目描述采用STAR法则：情境(Situation)、任务(Task)、行动(Action)、结果(Result)，突出个人贡献和业务影响
修正拼写错误（如“Exprience”应为“Experience”），统一日期格式（如“Jan 2017 - Jan 2018”）
增加一个简短的职业摘要（Professional Summary），概括核心能力和职业目标，吸引招聘者注意
